# Phase Behavior Test

**Summary**: Analysis of how fluids (oil, water, surfactant) interact to form micro-emulsions and affect interfacial tension.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-geri|Geri, 2013]] performed phase behavior tests to characterize the solubilization capabilities of FS-50 and FS-51.

## Key Results and Findings

- FS-51 provided better solublization than FS-50 at 36,000 ppm and 40,000 ppm NaCl. ([[2013-geri|Geri, 2013, p. 130]])
